title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions · Runtime Lens: Python Comprehensions
summary: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python comprehensions increment in an ordered service-record processor. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build readable list comprehensions with mapping and filtering while replacing deeply nested forms with explicit loops.
Use sorted, list sort, key functions, reverse order, and stable multi-pass sorting with clear mutation behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
